enrichment.summary: Kyle records a casual morning vlog from Boulder, mentioning internet problems, a recent motocross ride, and his main focus of working intensively on his website. He reflects on the cost of motocross (expensive tires, maintenance) and decides to prioritize his website project long-term, even if it takes decades.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Exciting but too expensive to ride regularly; will only go when the urge is strong
Fully committed to it as his main focus regardless of how long it takes
Largely disconnected from it currently, barely opening it

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm living way out of the YouTube world right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm doing this video for you log because I'm used to it and trying to keep up with the habit.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: YouTube is the last thing on my mind; I haven't even opened YouTube yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I watched a couple of Young Turks videos, but I can't really watch YouTube anymore.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: For the last week, I haven't been able to watch YouTube much because my internet sucks.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My cell phone can watch YouTube better than my computers can.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been forgetting to call my internet provider to fix my internet issues.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My computer sometimes takes a long time to start or gets stuck on the welcome screen.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday, I visited two houses and then came home to work on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I realized I'm more motivated to work on my website than I thought.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went motorcrossing because the area called me, even though I wanted to work on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Motorcross bikes can cover a lot of distance quickly.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Motorcross tires are expensive; the cheapest dirt tire I want costs $140.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It costs an additional $45 to put the tire on or $25 if I just bring the wheel in.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: A brand-new motorcross tire is only good for three or four hundred miles of trail riding.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I'll only go motorcrossing when the area calls me and focus on working on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm hardcore into working on my website right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm making progress on my website, even though it's taking a long time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've resigned myself to work on my website for as long as it takes.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm 40 years old, so even if I work 16 hours a day, I'll get it done eventually.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Even if it takes 20 years, I'll still be relatively young at 60 and it'll be badass.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My website is about volume, with lots of words and links to itself.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm tired because I was working on my website really late last night.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Today is a busy day because I have to move a lot and deal with my computer issues.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might turn off the video and finish my breakfast before dealing with my computer.
